The '''Government Tree''' was an important [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] structure in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Kepitenochan/Legends|Kepitenochan]] which was [[Devastation of Kashyyyk|destroyed]], along with the city, by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Hindane Darcc/Legends|Hindane Darcc]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and [[Weebacca]], along with other Wookiee [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] and workers, [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|reoccupied]] the city and rebuilt the Government Tree in order to contact the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] for the situation on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. However, this was impossible, since the [[Imperial Remnant]] had installed three [[Jammer/Legends|jamming stations]] nearby. The jammers were soon destroyed by Solo and the Wookiee [[Army/Legends|army]], allowing them to send their message.

==Behind the scenes==
The Government Tree at Kepitenochan appeared during a mission in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]]. In multiplayer, players can build monuments such as the Government Tree, and if defended for 200 in-game "days," can win the scenario.
